title: Marcel van Kervinck
text: Home * People * Marcel van Kervinck Marcel van Kervinck [1] Marcel van Kervinck , (March 27, 1972 – May 25, 2020 [2] ) was a Dutch software engineer and metrology . Marcel was author of the chess programs Rookie [3] , MSCP (Marcel’s Simple Chess Program) [4] , and the UCI engine Floyd for study purposes [5] , author of the online opening database Bookie [6] , and co-author of the Gigatron retro-style 8-bit microcomputer [7] [8] . From December 2012 until November 2014, he was a member of the board of the CSVN . Marcel van Kervinck passed away on May 25, 2020 [9] .
